log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Goblin — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 5 falling damage. HP: 173/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 169/178
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 24 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 43/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 25/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 9/67
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Goblin — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Goblin — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Goblin — Unarmored Caster.
→ Goblin — Unarmored Caster healed for 7 HP. HP: 16/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
